expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Enable admins to manage workspace membership and audit changes.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add membership audit event persistence",
      "description": "As a compliance stakeholder, I want membership changes persisted as audit events so that admin actions are traceable.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Audit records store actor, target member, action type, role context, and timestamp",
        "Audit records are created for invite, role change, and revoke actions",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/*membership-audit*",
        "src/models/membershipAudit.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Implement admin member invitation flow",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to invite a member by email so that I can grant workspace access without direct database edits.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admin can submit invite with email and initial role",
        "System creates pending membership invite for valid email",
        "Invite action creates a corresponding audit record",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/services/workspace/inviteMember.ts",
        "src/routes/workspaceMembers.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Implement admin member role change action",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to change a member role between viewer, editor, and admin so that permissions stay accurate.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Role change action allows viewer, editor, and admin values only",
        "Updated role persists and is returned in member listing responses",
        "Role change action creates an audit record",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/services/workspace/changeMemberRole.ts",
        "src/routes/workspaceMembers.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Implement admin access revoke action",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to revoke workspace access so that former collaborators are removed promptly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admin can revoke member access from workspace",
        "Revoked member no longer appears as active workspace member",
        "Revoke action creates an audit record",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/services/workspace/revokeMember.ts",
        "src/routes/workspaceMembers.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add membership management UI in workspace settings",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want settings controls for inviting, role updates, and revocation so that member management is self-serve.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Settings page includes invite form with email and role fields",
        "Each member row supports role changes and revoke action",
        "UI refreshes to reflect membership changes after successful actions",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/pages/settings/WorkspaceMembersPage.tsx",
        "src/components/settings/MemberRow.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Show recent membership changes in audit view",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes in settings so that I can verify who changed access and when.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Settings audit section lists recent membership events in reverse chronological order",
        "Audit rows show actor, action, affected member, and timestamp",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/pages/settings/WorkspaceMembersPage.tsx",
        "src/components/settings/MembershipAuditTable.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
